narrative: The project is in a red health state because more than 10 % of tasks have slipped past their baseline, with a full 100 % of tasks delayed. Milestone health is also poor, with the project only 44 % complete while 61.7 % of the elapsed time has passed, and 34 tasks that were scheduled to start are still not started. Blockers are a major issue, with 162 open blocker tasks—including three client‑owned blockers stalled for over two weeks—and 24 client‑owned tasks already past their end dates, indicating negative stakeholder sentiment. While the critical path risk remains green and there is no immediate risk to the critical path, budget burn data is not available and has been excluded from the scoring.
